questions.question: Which port does the Spring Boot API use locally?
questions.explanation: Spring runs on 8080 by default; Next.js UI is on 3000.

questions.question: Where must all UI → Spring HTTP calls go through?
questions.explanation: apiFetch → sessionFetch is the unified client stack.

questions.question: What stores revoked JWTs after logout?
questions.explanation: JwtAuthFilter checks Redis for blacklisted JTIs.

questions.question: Lighthouse MSME assessments link via which FK?
questions.explanation: MSME flow uses msme_profile_id; advisor flow uses client_id.

questions.question: Who owns a `clients` row?
questions.explanation: clients.user_id is the logged-in professional who manages the portfolio.

questions.question: Hibernate ddl-auto is set to?
questions.explanation: Schema must match entities; SQL migrations are run manually.

questions.question: Dashboard feature views are registered in?
questions.explanation: viewRegistry maps ?view= keys to lazy-loaded views.

questions.question: Which service scores Lighthouse assessments?
questions.explanation: Gemini generates pillar scores and narrative feedback.
